roa.docketEntryComment: Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance
DEFT - Motion to Release Defendant on Own Recognizance or on Affordable Bail (In re Humphrey)
/CAL:DISPOSITION/X:PROVISIONAL MAYAN INTERPRETER KARENT NOVELO CHAN SWORN//MO PC 1385: DISPOSITION IN CASE NO, 22003633/VD: 06-03-22  DISPOSITION DATE IN D-23/

/CAL: BAIL MOTION; FW FROM D22/X: THE MAYAN INTERPRETER IS WAIVED BY DEFENDANT AND COUNSEL FOR TODAY,/X: DEFENDANT AGREES THAT HE IS WILLING TO USESPANISH INTERPRETER TODAY,/INTC/X: M SEELY, CERTIFIED/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THESHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND PLACED ON HOME DETENTION AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTHON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER ACOORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/CTORD: APPROVED HOME DETENTION ACTIVITIES INCLUDE WORK AND COUNSELING/RX/WEAP/X: PTCHEARING DATE OF 05-17-22, D23 AND 05-27-22, D22 ARE CONFIRMED,/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT AND M99 STATUS 22003633/INTNC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S)& DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDTR: 06-14-22/CONTD: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE IN S23/CONTD: TRIAL INS22/DOP/

/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN (FTA 01-19-22, FTA ARRAIGNMENT, 1ST BW)/NP/BWDNC/CAUSE/SHER/BAIL:20000/CTORD: MAYAN INTERPRETER FOR 04-15-22/CONTD: INSTRUCTION, ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA AND COUNSEL, STATUS OF M99 22003633/DOPC/

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/NEGRPT/X: DEFENSE MAKE ORAL MOTION TO EXCLUDE NON-TESTIFYING WITNESSES/MO DENIED/X: THE MOTION IS MOOT AS THERE ISONLY ONE TESTIFYING WITNESS/WIT SWORN: OFFICER JOSEPH CANADY SFPD/EXHMA:PPL 1 3 PGS PHOTOS OF VICTIM, INJURED HAND AND PLYWOOD/HTA1: 1/X:EXHIBITSMARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERINGPARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/CONTD: ARRAIGNMENT/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/ACM/WEAP/NTW/LDPX:12-09-21 (10TH)/SA1:RANGEL LARA/SA2:622 GREEN ST, SF CA/SAORD2/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE:1 HOUR/DOP/
/CAL: DEFENSE BAIL MOTION, LD 06-14-22/INTNC/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 26/TRANS26:FORTHWITH FOR DEFENSE BAIL MOTION/X: FUTURE DATES CONFIRMED/
